reviews.comment:
Acá bien de provincia. Te saca del apuro , tiene todo para el auto, y te atienden perfecto. Les faltaría los clásicos pebetes del aca

(Translated by Google)
This is a real provincial place. It gets you out of a pinch, has everything for your car, and the service is excellent. They're just missing the classic pebetes from here.
